channel.title: Quotes on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Quotes on Have an average day :|

item.title: He does make a good point.
item.description: I don’t know much about Sam Harris, nor have I read The End of Faith. However this is does make a good point.

item.title: Foghorn Leghorn
item.description: This is gonna cause more confusion than a mouse in a burlesque show! Foghorn Leghorn http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/The_Looney_Tunes_Show# Foghorn_Leghorn
